title: OpenTimestamps Day Artifact Metadata
description: Sidecar metadata for an OpenTimestamps (OTS) proof anchoring a day-level artifact. This JSON is not part of the Merkle tree and MUST NOT be hashed into day_root.

day.description: UTC date (YYYY-MM-DD) of the anchored day artifact.

artifact.description: Relative path to the canonical artifact file that was stamped (e.g., out/site_demo/day/2025-10-07.bin).

artifact_sha256.description: Hex-encoded SHA-256 of the artifact at the time of stamping.

ots_proof.description: Relative path to the corresponding .ots proof file.

ots_client_version.description: Version string of the ots client used to generate or upgrade the proof.

bitcoin.description: Bitcoin anchoring details derived from the OTS proof. Placeholder, stationary, or calendar-pending proofs MUST NOT fabricate block data.

status.description: Whether the proof currently has no Bitcoin attestation, is pending calendar attestation, or contains Bitcoin attestation leaves.

attestation_heights.description: Bitcoin block heights parsed from BitcoinBlockHeaderAttestation leaves when present.

height.description: Legacy single Bitcoin height field; omit unless a real attestation is present.

blockhash.description: Optional block hash supplied by a trustless verification lane; never use a zero placeholder.

merkleroot.description: Optional Bitcoin block Merkle root supplied by a trustless verification lane; never use the artifact digest as a stand-in.

verified_at_utc.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the OTS proof was last verified.
